problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
